title: ShotBow
description: A weapon mod for BTA! or Better than Adventure. First modding project.
body:
# Installation
You'll need an instance of [Babric](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo), which is a loader that the [Better Than Adventure](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/) community uses for modding the game. (If you have stumbled upon this page without knowing what BTA is, click the blue link and read about it.) 

# Additions
- New endgame weapon, ShotBow. It shoots a burst of 16 steel arrows that deal large amounts of damage and disappear after hitting the ground.  
- Steel arrow, a new ammo type exclusive to the ShotBow.
# Crafting recipes
  ![Steel Arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b61008b87984cb22dfd054648c6f854475313f68.png)
![ShotBow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f67d8698069338f2cdf3177a43ec05d04f73f13.png)
# Incompatibilities
None are known, but if you find one - file a github issue please **(:**. 
# FAQ
Q. Why is it so expensive???\
A. Because it's intended to be an endgame weapon for ***automation modpacks***. If you dare to install the mod without any supporting mods, please don't complain about it being "unbalanced". It's an ender game wonderwaffle that you're supposed to work for.
